posts.message:
🚜🛸 Roswell Family Farm Transmission: The Three Chicken Tenders Are Back at Work 🛸🚜

While many kids are enjoying summer break, Waylon, Willow, and Wyatt are already hard at work helping raise the next flock of Roswell chickens.

From checking feeders and waterers to helping care for the birds every day, these three know that great chicken doesn’t happen by accident. It takes commitment, responsibility, and plenty of hard work.

In the second photo, Waylon is helping load chickens for their trip to the processor — the final step before they make their way to local families’ dinner tables.

Every flock we raise is a family effort. The lessons learned here go far beyond farming: hard work, responsibility, respect for animals, and pride in producing food for our community.

🐔 Pasture-raised chicken
👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family raised in Dolgeville & Salisbury, NY
🌙 Raised with care from day one
🛸 Packed with out-of-this-world flavor

Thank you for supporting local agriculture and helping farms like ours continue to grow.

Roswell Family Farm
Pasture Raised Meats
Abducted by Flavor.
